completed_tasks.name: ensemble-manager adapter wires is_optional into ModelIO
Add isOptional checkbox + badge to model-configuration.ts
ui docker-publish.yml widen branches + SAFE_BRANCH sanitization
SDK monkey-patch DatasetSpecificationToJSON/FromJSON to preserve isOptional
Move isOptional toggle from DSpec dialog to inline row checkbox
Widen mca ci.yml branches to '**' + SAFE_BRANCH tag
Hoist junction columns onto nested entity in mca response.ts
ui DSpec component _junctionOverlay preserves isOptional across lazy refetch
completed_tasks.rationale: Base ModelCatalogResource.setResources lazy-refetches each row by id; entity GET drops junction column; render+save read from _loadedResources, not the inline _resources. Subclass override captures inline isOptional and re-merges on requestUpdate.

completed_tasks.name: mca response mapper emits junction column as scalar (not array)
completed_tasks.rationale: 9bcbecd wrapped junction scalar in [val], mirroring v1.8.0 array convention for objects. UI render does !!(r as any).isOptional; !![false] === true (any array is truthy), so checkbox always rendered checked on refresh. Fix emits scalar; +2 vitest assertions.

completed_tasks.name: Show optional badge only in read mode; checkbox in edit mode
completed_tasks.rationale: User feedback: badge shouldn't render when not editing. Gate render on Action.EDIT_OR_ADD.

completed_tasks.name: Visual UI verification of optional checkbox + badge in dev cluster
completed_tasks.rationale: User confirmed UI behavior correct after helm upgrade with mca 213bc6c + ui c1fa149.

human_actions_pending.context: Long-term fix for SDK strip; prompt drafted earlier in session

decisions.decision: mca response.ts hoists junction column as scalar, not array
decisions.rationale: v1.8.0 array-wrapping convention is for relationship objects, not junction scalars. Array wrap broke UI: !![false] === true so checkbox always rendered checked. Scalar emit lets SDK FromJSONTyped patch copy through verbatim.

decisions.decision: ui DSpec component overlay: capture inline isOptional in setResources, merge in requestUpdate
decisions.rationale: Base ModelCatalogResource.setResources lazy-refetches each row via resourceApi.get(id); entity GET (/datasetspecifications/{id}) cannot return junction column. Render and getResources both read _loadedResources[id], so overlay must merge there.

decisions.decision: Optional UI: checkbox in edit mode, grey pill badge in read mode (only when isOptional=true)
decisions.rationale: User feedback: badge shouldn't show always. Gate on Action.EDIT_OR_ADD.

decisions.decision: Move isOptional toggle from DSpec edit dialog to inline row checkbox
decisions.rationale: isOptional is junction column on modelcatalog_configuration_input, not DSpec entity. PUT /datasetspecifications/{id} cannot persist it. Toggle must save via parent ModelConfiguration nested-write path.

decisions.decision: Move all phase 12 feature work off main onto gsd/phase-12-is-optional in superproject AND every modified submodule
decisions.rationale: User correction: never commit features on main. Cerebrum updated 2026-04-27.

decisions.decision: Pin ui + mca images by full commit SHA in helm-charts/dynamo-values.yaml
decisions.rationale: Docker tag spec forbids '/' in branch tag; SHA is unambiguous and immutable.

uncommitted_files: helm-charts/dynamo-values.yaml (gitignored inside helm-charts repo; local override pinned to ui c1fa149 + mca 213bc6c)

infrastructure.hasura: modelcatalog_configuration_input.is_optional boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false LIVE; metadata exposes it under both anonymous and user roles
infrastructure.migration_applied: 1771200016000_modelcatalog_configuration_input_is_optional applied + metadata reloaded (dev only). Staging/prod pending.
infrastructure.submodule_branches: All on gsd/phase-12-is-optional: super, graphql_engine, model-catalog-api, mint-ensemble-manager, ui, helm-charts

context_notes: Plan 12-05 visual verification PASSED end of session. The full bug chain that consumed plan 12-05: (a) SDK strips isOptional in PUT body -> sdk-patches.ts monkey-patch d8caed2; (b) UI was firing PUT /datasetspecifications which cannot reach junction -> moved toggle to inline checkbox 854fa75; (c) mca CI workflow not building feature branches -> 7109442; (d) mca GET response dropped junction column -> response.ts hoist 9bcbecd; (e) ui lazy-refetch of DSpec wiped isOptional from render+save -> _junctionOverlay 6a04cf4; (f) mca hoist wrapped scalar in array, !![false]===true so refresh always showed checked -> scalar emit 213bc6c; (g) badge UX: only show in edit mode -> c1fa149. All 4 prior phase-12 plans (12-01..12-04) already complete with SUMMARY.md committed. Only finalize + phase verification remain. Phase 12 is the last phase of milestone v2.0 (which was marked complete 2026-03-15 but is being polished with phase 12 work). Helm-charts/dynamo-values.yaml is a local-only gitignored override; if it needs version control, that's a separate decision (todo 2026-04-26-secure-dynamo-values-yaml-secrets.md is pending). The 'mca CI build skipped' false alarm during this session was due to two CI runs per commit (push + pull_request); push run always builds, pull_request run skips by design (`if: github.event_name == 'push'`).
